channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress flytipping, 7th April
item.description:
Mattress left outside the door of the HKR building, now moved onto road. Was left overnight between 11pm and 8am - CCTV is available from the building.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dawson Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All new plants have been pulled out and thrown onto the road in Albion Road - they were planted a couple weeks ago, 7th April
item.description:
All new plants have been pulled out and thrown onto the road in Albion Road - they were planted a couple weeks ago - group of kids have come along and done both sides of the road where the grass verges are...please can this be looked into and possibly be replanted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 shopping trolleys, 7th April
item.description:
2 shopping trolleys

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Hodson Crescent, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 7th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on edge of Lower Marvels Woods, spilling onto Court Farm Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left over the estate, 7th April
item.description:
The refuse appears to have been collected from these bins but there were obviously a couple left outside which have been opened and the rubbish has not been cleaned away .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newington Butts, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More illegal pavement parking - all 4 wheels on pavement, 7th April
item.description:
Dark VW - reg EF17 V** Parked on pavement This happens repeatedly because council will not replace the metal posts to stop this happening
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redfern Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive defects around the manhole on the bus lane., 7th April
item.description:
Represents an immediate danger to passengers on busses that use the lane. Very very dangerous damage to the manhole.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped, 7th April
item.description:
Bedroom furniture dumped on the green behind cable box. This is in addition to the furniture on the other green.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palewell Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken play equipment, 7th April
item.description:
The ride on horse is broken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honor Oak Park, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car dumped outside of 69 - 69a Northumberland Way, 7th April
item.description:
Car has been dumped on Saturday 4th April. Damaged front side wheel.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip: refrigerator and household waste, 7th April
item.description:
Fly tip on the pavement. Letters with address found in rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhanging steps, 7th April
item.description:
Branches are low and sharp hanging down over staircase, liable to injure or poke someone’s eye out. Especially at night time when dark and not visible. Have hit me on the head, anyone taller could potentially lose an eye

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Court Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed limit sign, 7th April
item.description:
Speed limit sign been removed and on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penarth Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped clothes, rubbish and grass cuttings., 7th April
item.description:
Dumped over the weekend.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed recycling bin, 7th April
item.description:
Recycling bin has not been emptied. The neighbours bins have been emptied but not the bin for 133 waters Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitefoot Lane, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit parking sign removed, 7th April
item.description:
Permit parking sign has been removed from Penarth street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ilderton Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 banners have been hung up on gates to park and fence to side, 7th April
item.description:
Entrance gates and fence recently painted and area cleaned up , now the banners attached have returned making the area look scruffy again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to tree, 7th April
item.description:
Flytip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of domestic rubbish torn open by foxes with contents of bags strewn all over the road in Love Walk beside Love Walk Cafe in Camberwell SE5., 7th April
item.description:
Foxes have torn open bags of domestic rubbish and rubbish is now spread across the road beside the Love Walk Cafe (Love Walk side). The bags of rubbish don’t seem to have been put in the green bins.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Love Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fox or dog mess, 7th April
item.description:
No pictures, as this was seen this morning, rushing to work. The location is outside the top gate of 52a median road e5 0pl. This is very noticeable and will not be missed. please have this moved and cleaned today.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
